assertions.description: navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia is the entry point on which restrictOwnAudio is a constraint of the captured display surface.
MediaDevices.getSupportedConstraints includes 'restrictOwnAudio' once supported; the dictionary reports whether the UA knows the constraint name.
MediaStreamTrack.prototype.applyConstraints is the runtime path that toggles restrictOwnAudio after capture has started.
MediaStreamTrack.prototype.getSettings returns a dictionary; UA implementations expose restrictOwnAudio there once applied.
MediaStream.prototype.getAudioTracks exists; restrictOwnAudio applies to the audio track of a captured surface.
PermissionsPolicy/featurePolicy interface is available so 'display-capture' (the gate for getDisplayMedia) can be introspected.
